titleStmt.title: SII 25.172: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 172. (A.R. No. 172 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.

This inscription which is partly built in, commences with the praśasti, Kaḍal-śūḻnda-pār-ēḻun, etc., of the king. The details of date viz., year 6, Mīṉa śu 6, Thursday, Rōhiṇī correspond to 6th March, 1169 A.D.

It seems to record an undertaking given to one Kavi ••••• Arayaṉ Periyāṉ, a Śivabrāhmaṇa of the temple of Siddhīśvaram-uḍiyār at Tirunaṟaiyūr in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu for the gift received from him, for maintaining a sandhi lamp in this temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § kaṭalcūḻnta pāreḻunticai Eṭṭuṅkāttu ninṟu taṭamāmatiyeṉa viḷaṅkittaraḷa veṇkuṭai nilā veṟippa Āḻivarai parappāka Aṭaṟkaliyaip pilantotukki Ūḻitoṟum pukaḻoṅka cuveyileṟippa kayal cilaiyiṟ kālvaḷaiyak kaḷiṟāḻiyiṟ tāṭ taṭippa pullāḻiyiṟ poṟṟi ceyyap puli meruvil viṟṟiruppa tiruvāṇaiyuñ ceṅkolun ticai Eṭṭuṅkāval koḷḷap peruvāḻvu peṟṟuyiraṉaittum ve tāmeṉat taṉikkūrc camaiyam Āṟuñ talaiyeṭuppat tarumamum Arumaṟaiyum Oṅka Amaivillā maṉuvoḻukkam Ātiyāmpaṭi
nilai niṟka yāppiṉum tamiyuṟu tanpiṉum Onṟoṭoṉṟu pakaiyiṉṟip poru puliyum pulvāyum pukkoru tuṟai niruṇṇa poṉṉi(n)etiyum poyyātu puyaṉum puṉal karavātu maṉṉiya (n)etivaḷam Iruttara viḷḷai vayalkaḷ vaḷañcu(ra)ppa bhokapūmiy Atu Eṉnap Ekavāṇai Araicurimai Eḻupoḻilkaḷum peṟṟateṉṉap pāṟkaṭaliṟ kāṟkaṭaliṟpaṭi vāḻa muṭicūṭi Ārttavamār Aviṣekacalatti laracu nilaikāṭṭa Evvulaku miruḷ niṅkavanta komā nivaneṉṉak kavvaitirak kalikālat tātikāla
ṉeṉa Ivaṉ kākkum puviyaṉaittum yāvaiyum Ini tirunteruḷi Avaṉ kākkum Akila lokamum Aṭiyaṭaiyak kulaipaṭuvaṉa teṅkukkaḷe koṭpaṭuvaṉa Iḷaṅkamuke Alaipaṭuvaṉa nir nilame Atirpaṭuvaṉa Iṭiyeṟe taḷampaṭuvaṉa porvarampe taṭaipaṭuvaṉa kopurame Uḷampaṭuvaṉa cūṉmakaḷire Oṟuppuṇpaṉa matakkaḷuṟeRead kaḷiṟe taṭuppuṇpaṉa koṭṭakame taḷḷumaṇpaṉa cetakame koṭuṇpaṉa teṉtalai poruḷḷe koḷpaṭuvaṉa tamuṭporuḷḷe taṭṭuṇpaṉa neṭuṅkoṭiye kaṟaipaṭuvaṉa niṟaimatiye ppuṇpaṉa Aṇi Alkule paripaṭuvaṉa pāriyātame ku(ṟ)
ṟaipaṭuvaṉa kuḻaccuruḷe kuḻaivillana maṇik koṅkaiye maṟaipaṭuvana curakāñciye malarkoḷvaṉa vaṇaṅkuṭaiye Eṉṟu pāṭi pārventar Iṉaṅkaḷavaṟṟiṉ peṟpoka ceṉṟiṟaiñcippārve—Continuation not traceable.
tiruvācaṟ puṟaṉiṟpacceralarum teṉnavaruñ ciṅkaḷaruṅ koṅkaḷarum pocalarum piṟaveṇṭippiriyātu cevippattam Aracu tām peṟṟut tammuṭane muṭicūṭi Aḻamaruṅkuṟai teviyarkaḷ Aṇi—
maṅkalam peṟṟaruḷ vāḷaracar talaikāppa yātavar kulamarapil vanta coḷakula maṇiviḷakku coḻakulamāṇikka maṭaṉāḷ mutaṟkaṇ nāṉkiṉ vaṭivukoṇṭu vaḷavacekaraṉ tiruvāṇaiyum ceṅkolu muṭaṉ cella —
maṇṇaracu vantiṟaiñca makuṭampuṉai vaḷaṉuṉuṭaṉRead vaḷavaṉuṭaṉ peṇṇaracum peruntāyamum peṟṟaruḷum peṇperumāḷ Uṟaiyūrum peruntakaiyum maturāpuriyu muṟai muṟaiye yāṇṭaruḷi muḷarittātaNo. 540 of 1908 reads muḷirnakar •tuṟantavaṉṉam poṉnāsanañ ciṅkavaṇai polaṅ kaṟpakappūñcolai muṉṉeval nittal muṟai muṟaiye peṟumulaip perumā—
tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājātirājadevarkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu miṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṉi nāḷ santi viḷakkerikka Upaiyap piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu . kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr Uṭaiyār cittiśvaramuṭaiyār koyilil civappirāmaṇa kavi
Arayaṉ periyāṉ pakkal nāṅkaḷ va k koṇṭu Ikkoyilukku santiviḷakkuc celutta Upaiyappiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta parica—Rest is built in.
Digital edition of SII 25.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
